/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -static -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc CMakeFiles/titanbench.dir/src/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/titanbench.dir/src/cli/args.cpp.o CMakeFiles/titanbench.dir/src/cli/report.cpp.o CMakeFiles/titanbench.dir/src/core/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/titanbench.dir/src/core/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/titanbench.dir/src/net/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/titanbench.dir/src/net/ssl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/titanbench.dir/src/protocol/http.cpp.o -o titanbench  /home/zt/titanbench/vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libwolfssl.a -lm
